response.justification: Bogdan is a deeply experienced generalist engineer (19+ years, staff-level, strong TypeScript/Node and testing culture) whose current role at re:cinq touches directly relevant ground — MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and his GenAI exposure appears to span roughly the last year; the resume shows no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or Python, and cloud experience is limited to some AWS CDK work. He could grow into a forward-deployed GenAI role, but he does not meet the core AI-experience bar as written.
strengths: Hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow infrastructure work in current staff-level role, matching key technologies in the JD
19+ years of production software engineering across web, embedded, and high-throughput low-latency systems, with strong TypeScript depth
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, courses, conference talks), relevant to customer-facing technical leadership
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions — GenAI experience appears limited to ~1 year
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, LLM evaluation/observability, or data-pipeline experience on the resume
Python is absent from the skills list, and cloud platform experience (AWS CDK only) is thin for a cloud-delivery-focused role

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG, vector DB, and evaluation-pipeline evidence
